programme.title: Port Adelaide Power vs West Coast Eagles
programme.desc: Both sides are aiming for back to back wins as your Sunday Ticket begins on Fox Footy.

programme.title: Brisbane Lions vs Collingwood Magpies
programme.desc: The Lions host the Pies in Round 4.

programme.title: North Melbourne Kangaroos vs Carlton Blues
programme.desc: The Roos and Blues meet in Round 4.

programme.title: Richmond Tigers vs Port Adelaide Power
programme.desc: The Tigers meet the Power in Round 4.

programme.title: Melbourne Demons vs Gold Coast Suns
programme.desc: The Dees and Suns meet in Round 4.

programme.title: Hawthorn Hawks vs Geelong Cats
programme.desc: The Hawks and Cats close out Round 4.

programme.title: Adelaide Crows vs Carlton Blues
programme.desc: Round 5 begins with the Blues travelling to face the Crows.

programme.title: Collingwood Magpies vs Fremantle Dockers
programme.desc: The Pies host the Dockers in Round 5.

programme.title: North Melbourne Kangaroos vs Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: The Lions travel to face the Roos in Round 5.

programme.title: Sydney Swans vs Gold Coast Suns
programme.desc: The Swans welcome the Suns to the SCG in Round 5.

programme.title: Queensland Firebirds vs Adelaide Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The Firebirds are looking for their first win of the season as they host the red-hot Thunderbirds.

programme.title: West Coast Fever vs Giants Netball
programme.desc: The Fever search for back-to-back home wins as they host the struggling Giants at RAC Arena.

programme.title: Giants Netball vs Queensland Firebirds
programme.desc: The Giants host the Firebirds in Sydney.

programme.title: Mavericks vs Adelaide Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The Mavericks host the Thunderbrids in Melbourne.

programme.title: NSW Swifts vs West Coast Fever
programme.desc: The Swifts host the Fever in Sydney.

programme.title: Melbourne Vixens vs Sunshine Coast Lightning
programme.desc: The Vixens host the Lightning in Melbourne.

programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: Mercedes arrives in dominant form, while Ferrari emerges as their primary threat, and defending champions McLaren fight to salvage their season.

programme.title: Carlton Blues vs Melbourne Demons
programme.desc: Demons captain Max Gawn plays his 250th game against the Blues at the MCG.

programme.title: Adelaide Crows vs Fremantle Dockers
programme.desc: The Crows and Dockers face off in Round 4.

programme.title: West Coast Eagles vs Sydney Swans
programme.desc: Old rivals West Coast and Sydney meet in Round 4.

programme.title: Western Bulldogs vs Essendon Bombers
programme.desc: The Dogs meet the Bombers in Round 4.

programme.title: Essendon Bombers vs Melbourne Demons
programme.desc: The Bombers and Dees collide in Round 5.

programme.title: Hawthorn Hawks vs Western Bulldogs
programme.desc: The Hawks and Dogs face off in Round 5.

programme.title: Gold Coast Titans vs St George Illawarra
programme.desc: Extra intensity for Round 4's final clash, with both teams chasing their first victory of the season.
